basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has officially announced the Software Engineer (.NET) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIM Kozhikode website. Candidates up to 30 years of age holding B.Tech/ BE, MCA, M.Sc., M.Tech, MS in Software Systems, BCA, B.Sc., or a Diploma in relevant disciplines with the required professional experience are eligible to submit their online applications on or before 02 August 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE)/ BE(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE)/ MCA/ M.Sc/M.Tech(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or MS in Software Systems or equivalent with 2 years experience, BCA/ BSc(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE)/Three-year full-time Diploma in (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or equivalent with 3 years experience, Experience in complete lifecycle of web application development as full stack developer/mobile app developer, Desirable: .NET, MS-SQL, React Native, Flutter, JavaScript/TypeScript, RESTful APIs, Git, npm/yarn
qualification.details: Software Engineer (.NET): B.Tech(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) / BE(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) / MCA / M.Sc / M. Tech (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or MS in Software Systems or equivalent. Minimum 2 years' relevant post qualification experience in Software Development OR IT System Projects OR Website Development OR Mobile Application Development etc. BCA, BSc(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE)/ Three-year full-time Diploma in (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or equivalent. Minimum 3 years' relevant post-qualification experience in Software Development OR IT System Projects OR Website Development OR Mobile Application Development etc. Experience in complete lifecycle of web application development. Experience as a full stack developer/mobile app developer. Desirable Experience: Experience in software code development for web or mobile apps; Proficient in application stacks like .NET, MS-SQL etc. OR Experience in React Native, Flutter, JavaScript/TypeScript, RESTful APIs, third-party libraries. Knowledge of UI/UX design principles, Git, npm/yarn.

selection_process: Screening of Applications Practical Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer (.NET) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer (.NET) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer (.NET) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer (.NET) recruitment is 02-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Software Engineer (.NET) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Software Engineer (.NET) post at IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Software Engineer (.NET) position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/BE/MCA/M.Sc/M.Tech or MS in Software Systems with 2 years of experience, or BCA/BSc/Diploma with 3 years of experience. Experience in full-stack or mobile app development is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Software Engineer (.NET) role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Software Engineer (.NET) position is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Software Engineer (.NET) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 35,300 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer (.NET) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes screening of applications, a practical test, an interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Software Engineer (.NET) position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. How should I apply for the IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer (.NET) vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided 'Apply Online' link on or before the last date.
